summary: Iteration 70: OrderBot Commands Testing - All features verified. Backend: 19/20 tests passed (1 skipped due to no traded items in DB). Frontend: All command flows (adjust, transfer, expense, search) working correctly. Manufactured item restriction properly implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: Adjust command correctly restricts to Traded Items and Raw Materials only
Frontend shows clear note: '(Manufactured items cannot be adjusted - use production flow)'
Backend properly rejects manufactured items with 400 status and descriptive error message
Transfer command validates same-firm rejection and negative quantity rejection
Expense command supports GST and non-GST recording with proper total calculation
State normalization API working correctly (UP -> Uttar Pradesh with exact confidence)
Expense categories endpoint returns all 18 categories as expected
Universal search endpoint returns proper structure for all search types
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 70 verified OrderBot commands. Key features: 1) adjust command only allows traded_item and raw_material types - manufactured items rejected with 400 error, 2) transfer command validates same-firm and negative quantity, 3) expense command supports GST with proper total calculation, 4) state normalization works (UP->Uttar Pradesh), 5) expense-categories returns 18 categories. Frontend widget accessible via data-testid='orderbot-toggle' at bottom right of dashboard.

adjust_command_traded_items.details: Traded items can be adjusted via bot/adjust-inventory endpoint

adjust_command_raw_materials.details: Raw materials can be adjusted via bot/adjust-inventory endpoint

adjust_command_manufactured_rejection.details: Manufactured items rejected with 400 status and message about production flow

transfer_command.details: Stock transfer between firms with invoice number, validates same-firm and negative qty

expense_command.details: Records expenses with categories, GST options, payment modes

state_normalization.details: UP -> Uttar Pradesh with exact confidence, supports abbreviations and full names

expense_categories.details: Returns 18 categories including Office Supplies, Utilities, Rent, etc.

universal_search.details: Searches across amazon_orders, pending_fulfillment, dispatches, tickets, serials, phone

frontend_adjust_flow.details: Shows only 2 options (Traded Item, Raw Material) with manufactured restriction note

frontend_transfer_flow.details: Stock Transfer flow with firm selection working correctly

frontend_expense_flow.details: Record Expense flow with firm selection working correctly
